item.title: Wait horned lizards do what!?!
item.description: Spooky fact: when Horned Lizards feel threatened they shoot blood from their eyes. Their blood is also toxic due to their diet of poisonous ants. Credit: NaturalHabitatShorts (instagram)
item.dc:creator: ExistentialDreadPirateRoberts

item.dc:creator: AjKaramba

item.title: Noodle goes to the cat salon
item.dc:creator: friendlynoodles

item.title: Stuff I've seen at work since Helene.
item.description:
It's easy for a lineman to forget that he's hauling a 40ft long utility pole on his bucket truck.
The ground wire failed on this utility pole.
People got desperate to get their internet back.
"Just find your tone and splice in." This is old school internet. DSL to be exact. It's also something called POTS. (Plain Old Telephone Service.)
I bet the power company got a kick out of this one.
My kittens. Sidewinder and Hellfire (Their mother is nicknamed "Missy." Her name at the vet is registered as MISSILE LAUNCHER.)
What's left of the DSL cable that gave 800 people their internet service.
Believe it or not, kids, the internet actually looked like this, before 9/11.
Ultra zoomed in, but this white oak was nearly 200ft long.
Now THIS shit is cool! This is called 2400 pair CO Cable. This is old school phone service inside the main data building. Your parents landlines used to connect to this. Some of us older folks connected to AOL on cables like this.
This is the same CO cable, but distrubuted to 10 different feeder cables of 240 pair each. These would go to cabinets called "Cross Boxes" across every city in america. (that image was a little bit further up with the orange and white knobs). Those cross boxes would feed terminals up and down the neighborhood, and the customers would connect from the terminals to their house.
This is the manufacturing stamp of that 2400 pair cable. July 1973.
This is an unintentional demonstration of what a terminal looks like. The white strip at the bottom of the pic is what phone wires tie into in order to bring dial tone inside the house.
A bucket truck that I saw at a rest area while I was between work orders.
The amount of copper wire I've had to salvage from repairs per day. That really fancy orderly looking stuff at the bottom is fiber optic line.
A bonus for making it this far
"I shall not fear. Fear is the mind killer." -this utility lineman
The only resident I could find who didn't know about the hurricane.
The day of. I knew this storm was gonna wreck us.
These guys are saviors. No wonder Lineman are cocky and arrogant and bullheaded.
Fiber terminal. Multigig to be exact. This does not look good from any house. Fiber is made of glass. Glass doesn't bend like that.
5g tower. Doesn't even run LTE speeds. (Just kidding. The power was cut to it immediately before it started irradiating the ground in a 50ft radius and turning the frogs gay.)
They had spare adamantium after making wolverines skeleton and decided to use the surplus to make these dudes testicles.
A fiber optic case. It's supposed to be in the air. It's lif is supposed to be sealed too.
Our local amphitheater. The fence behind the canopy is where the river is supposed to stop.
We really had no idea what hit us. It's been three weeks and we're still finding wild stuff.
These were taken by a friend of mine with a super fancy camera.
What's left of city hall
What's left of a rail bridge that has seen service since 1840.
We had no idea what hit us. It was only a category 2.
This is the local Riverwalk. There aren't any trees at our local Riverwalk. There have never been trees at our local Riverwalk.
There are where the trees are supposed to be.
It's an extra. I know. Yall probably didn't make it this far anyway. I'm gonna stop typing now. Enjoy the rest of the album
item.dc:creator: MayMyEnemiesLiveLong

item.dc:creator: Ardeakinfelfa

item.title: Kamala Harris calls out faux News TO THEIR FACE for trying to downplay Trump’s insanity
item.description:
I broke this into two parts. I’m not giving you a link to Faux news, you can go here if you like, to the site formerly known as Twitter, it sucks, but it’s better than Faux news: https://x.com/harryjsisson/status/1846684953402396897 Here’s what she’s talking about. Unsurprisingly, Faux news had nothing to say about it:
Please share this far and wide! Edit: related post- https://imgur.com/gallery/bOheQ6h Register to vote and/or check the status of your voter registration by going here: IWillVote.com or to vote.gov . If you make use of mail-in voting, check trackvote.org to find out if your state offers a ballot tracking service. If your state permits early voting, consider taking advantage of that privilege! Certain states continue to “accidentally” purge legally registered voters from their rolls, so check to make sure you haven’t been purged. Be sure to vote in every election, including the “small” ones. The “big” politicians often got their start by winning the small elections. You can help weed out the bad ones early. #vote
item.dc:creator: SisterMidnight

item.title: This is one of the best things I've read today
item.description: https://www.newsweek.com/north-korean-troops-deserting-ukraine-frontline-hours-after-arrival-report-1969726 If I were a North Korean citizen, I would be banging down the doors to volunteer to go fight with the Russian army, not because I'd actually be fighting, but because I would finally be able to escape North Korea, and then surrender to Ukrainian soldiers, and then be done with both North Korea and Russia in one fell swoop. This is great!
item.dc:creator: BonafideHomicide

item.title: Great points about the political "polling" in the "news"
item.description: Jeff Tiedrich makes some really good points about Republicans doing their own polls and pushing out disinformation to try to defeat Democrats. Don't buy it. VOTE BLUE. To read the rest of this: https://www.jefftiedrich.com/p/the-polls-and-the-press-want-you Tiedrich also routinely does detailed ripping of Trump and MAGA, which can be entertaining -- in case you're interested in his Substack.

item.title: Memes and stuff: partly things I send to my bf.
item.description:
I need to use this on somebody.
For all the David Burnes / talking heads fans.
I became radicalized back in 6th grade when we did a job planning thing for school. The idea of prices of things exceeding what could be earned scared me. Now I have better words and ways to express it.
The water in my apartment is super hard, I ordered a brita pitcher. I've been drinking so much more water.
I never got into mmo's, but the idea of this isn't new. Pretty much any interest brings unlikely people together.
Damn, she means business. If my email does not contain a couple of exclamation points, I'm pissed.
Oh no, super spoopy. ?
My bf and I argue about which final fantasy is the best. I say 6, and he says 7. I told him that ff7 is just a bunch of gay stereotypes. Cloud - twink Barret - bear Cid - daddy Sephiroth - self hating gay Vincent - leather daddy Aerith - cottagecore Tifa - masc Yuffie - brat Red xiii - furry Cait sith - voyeur Edit update: thanks @blackmetalcoyote and @CarbyD for correcting yuffie.
I know her! She's me, lol
My bf is into halo, I had to send him this, lol
Someone had to explain this to me, I regret this knowledge. Good for her tho.
I mean, while you're down there....
Still not enough for all my plushies.
Good things come to those who wait, and I got banana bread, at work. Hell yeah. Just ignore and move on.
It's a simple ask.
Sent to my bf...
Is me when I forget to take my Adderall.
Huh?!
Aeewwwwwe <3
I know nothing about wrestling or Warhammer, but to still funny.
I was recently told what bricked up was. It does not refer to guys being muscular....
I'd play it.
Felt
Love making my insides wet.
My bf can name a lot of them, lol
I've never wanted to be sad more in my entire life.
New fanfic genre just dropped
item.dc:creator: wonkysaurusrex

item.title: Weeping Angel Body paint - MCroft07
item.description:
I painted this on myself using a mirror (and brushes). Took around 6 hours. I did film a process video as well which was really fun on TikTok/IG if you wanted to see it :) I exist on the internet here: Instagram: www.instagram.com/mcroft07 Twitter: www.twitter.com/MCroft07 Tiktok: www.tiktok.com/@mcroft07 Twitch: www.twitch.tv/mcroft07
Extra photos because I was super proud of it! (I edited the teeth to match)
Extra photos because I was super proud of it!
item.dc:creator: MCroft07

item.title: Why I can't wait for 1-click cancel
item.description: Marked mature for spicy language. Went to cancel my Sirius XM subscription (got an amazing year-long deal) and they forced me to chat with an AI bot in order to cancel the subscription. Fuck. That. Noise.
item.dc:creator: OohDaLolly

item.title: lost my little brother.
item.description: i don’t really even know what to say. i’m not coping well and words are hard lately. his name is billy. he just turned 25 on august 6th. passed august 23rd. very sudden and very traumatic. he always introduces himself with “howdy, i’m bill factor” and a firm handshake. always greeted me with a “howdy, sis”. gave a hug that could make anything okay. i miss him so much it’s crippling. just wanted to share him with the world, maybe throw out a “howdy, bill” if you can. i don’t know what to do without him. best brother, best uncle to my children, best son to our mother, best human being i will ever know. i can’t fathom how life is just going on without him. the pain is so heavy. thank you for letting me word vomit. i am so sorry for anyone else that may be grieving. my heart is with you. i love you, brother. *edit* i want to sincerely thank you all from my bones for allowing me to share not only my love for him, but my grief as well. every single one of you have provided a moment of comfort in an unsettling time. thank you all so, so much. i am deeply saddened by all of your losses and i grieve with you.
item.dc:creator: adhdlatte
